# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: low-latency-data-processor
    tier: data-processing
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: low-latency-data-processor
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: low-latency-data-processor
        tier: data-processing
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: myregistry/low-latency-data-processor:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: metrics
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: ENABLE_DIRECT_NETWORK
              value: "true"
            - name: LATENCY_MODE
              value: "ultra-low"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 1Gi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: low-latency-data-processor
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: low-latency-data-processor
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: metrics
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: real-time-streaming-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: real-time-streaming-service
    tier: streaming
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: real-time-streaming-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: real-time-streaming-service
        tier: streaming
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: streaming-service
          image: myregistry/real-time-streaming:2.1.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 7000
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 7001
              name: websocket
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9091
              name: metrics
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: STREAM_BUFFER_SIZE
              value: "4096"
            - name: DIRECT_CONNECTION_MODE
              value: "true"
            - name: MAX_CONNECTIONS
              value: "10000"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "4"
              memory: 2Gi
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 7000
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 7000
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 45
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: real-time-streaming-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: real-time-streaming-service
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: real-time-streaming-service
  ports:
    - name: grpc
      port: 7000
      targetPort: 7000
      protocol: TCP
    - name: websocket
      port: 7001
      targetPort: 7001
      protocol: TCP
    - name: metrics
      port: 9091
      targetPort: 9091
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: high-frequency-cache-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: high-frequency-cache-service
    tier: caching
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: high-frequency-cache-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: high-frequency-cache-service
        tier: caching
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: cache-service
          image: myregistry/high-frequency-cache:1.5.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: cache
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9092
              name: metrics
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: CACHE_MAX_MEMORY
              value: "1gb"
            - name: CACHE_EVICTION_POLICY
              value: "allkeys-lru"
            - name: DIRECT_NETWORK_ACCESS
              value: "true"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 2Gi
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 6379
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
          volumeMounts:
            - name: cache-data
              mountPath: /data
      volumes:
        - name: cache-data
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 2Gi
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: high-frequency-cache-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: high-frequency-cache-service
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: high-frequency-cache-service
  ports:
    - name: cache
      port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      protocol: TCP
    - name: metrics
      port: 9092
      targetPort: 9092
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: dns-resolver-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: dns-resolver-service
    tier: networking
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: dns-resolver-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: dns-resolver-service
        tier: networking
        mesh-bypass: "true"
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: dns-resolver
          image: myregistry/dns-resolver:1.2.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5353
              name: dns-udp
              protocol: UDP
            - containerPort: 5353
              name: dns-tcp
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8053
              name: http-api
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: DNS_CACHE_TTL
              value: "300"
            - name: UPSTREAM_DNS_SERVERS
              value: "8.8.8.8,8.8.4.4"
            - name: BYPASS_MESH_PROXY
              value: "true"
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 128Mi
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8053
            initialDelaySeconds: 3
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8053
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 15
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: dns-resolver-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: dns-resolver-service
    mesh-bypass: "true"
spec:
  selector:
    app: dns-resolver-service
  ports:
    - name: dns-udp
      port: 5353
      targetPort: 5353
      protocol: UDP
    - name: dns-tcp
      port: 5353
      targetPort: 5353
      protocol: TCP
    - name: http-api
      port: 8053
      targetPort: 8053
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-direct-access-mesh-bypass
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      mesh-bypass: "true"
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: production
        - podSelector: {}
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
    - to:
        - ipBlock:
            cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
            except:
              - 169.254.169.254/32
